personal.title: Software Engineer
personal.description: Software Engineer with a focus on building real-time applications, AI-driven platforms, and scalable backends. Experienced in Electron, React, Node.js, and Blockchain technologies.

projects.title: Featured Innovations
projects.subtitle: Architecting high-performance systems and AI platforms

list.title: EchoAI (GustoAI Concierge)
list.description: A real-time voice-to-voice AI platform built for zero-latency interactions. Features advanced voice activity detection (VAD), neural speech synthesis, and smart interruption handling for natural human-AI dialogue.

list.title: CloseFlow AI (Follow-AI)
list.description: Multi-tenant B2B SaaS platform automating lead follow-ups via Vapi.ai and Deepgram, secured with Supabase RLS and geo-routed billing.

list.title: Embeddable AI Chat Agent
list.description: Built a lightweight, highly customizable AI chat agent widget designed to be easily integrable into any external website via a simple script tag for context-aware support.

list.title: Risk Reducer Trading Platform
list.description: True Full-Stack algorithmic trading platform with custom Dynamic Strength Scoring and automated Stop-Loss execution via Binance/CoinDCX integrations.

list.title: Institutional Trading Platform (OMET)
list.description: Engineered a high-performance, real-time institutional trading desktop application from scratch. Architected multi-window IPC, state management, and real-time WebSocket data pipelines.

list.title: Crypto Asset Management Gateway/RAG
list.description: Architected a robust microservices backend utilizing NestJS and GraphQL with advanced RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) processing for secure wallet workflows.

list.title: Automated Web3 Airdrop Ecosystem
list.description: Built a dApp and automated pipeline for Solana-based token distribution featuring direct Phantom Wallet integration and custom scrapers for autonomous execution.

list.title: Kigentech — Digital Hydrogen Tracking
list.description: Blockchain-powered B2B SaaS platform tokenizing green hydrogen supply chains on Polygon. Built full-stack: React frontend, NestJS engine, Solidity smart contracts, and Merkle Tree data integrity.

list.title: Cryptocase: Gamified Investment
list.description: Designed the architecture for a unique investment platform blending finance with gamification. Built custom background workers for real-time leaderboard generation and performance tracking.

list.title: Larkfinserv Fintech SDK
list.description: Created a plug-and-play frontend SDK to streamline complex financial onboarding. Featured cross-origin communication and live MFCentral API integration.

experience.title: Professional Path
experience.subtitle: Building impactful software at leading technology firms

description: Built a real-time trading desktop application using Electron and React, implementing IPC-based communication.
Optimized state handling for high-frequency market data updates, improving performance.
Designed and developed core modules (Launcher, Responder, Upsize, Blotter) for low-latency execution.
Led task planning, sprint coordination, and mentored teammates through structured KT sessions.
Integrated multichain support (BSC, Polygon, Solana, Tron) and developed Kafka-based blockchain listeners.
Integrated ChatGPT-4o for AI content generation and media moderation.
Developed REST APIs using Express.js with PostgreSQL for enterprise-grade solutions.
Built authentication, user roles, and notification modules with secure protocols.
Deployed services on AWS using PM2 and managed cloud storage with S3.
Collaborated in Agile sprints and documented APIs using Swagger.
